---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a public-safe enhancement to the bridge, docs, or launch surface.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Capability Impact

Does this affect any of these?

- `shared-thread-resume`
- `autonomous-thread`
- generated artifact delivery
- media providers
- live `/call`
- terminal lane
- Telegram routing or approvals

## Privacy Or Security Impact

Call out any new secrets, new external surfaces, or new local data handling.
